name: Searching Files for Credentials
description: Detects searches for credentials in files using findstr, grep, or similar tools
query:
// Detect credential hunting in files
// Trigger on searching for password patterns in files
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(findstr|grep|Select-String).*(password|passwd|credential|secret|api.?key|token|private.?key)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
